impact: This advances the PP&D process-model backlog with a deterministic, redacted sign permit workflow fixture that captures stages, facts, documents, file rules, fee/payment checkpoints, inspections/finalization gates, and citation-backed action gates without live crawl or DevHub automation.
summary: Adds a fixture-only sign permit process skeleton and focused validation test using public source-inventory evidence only.
target_task: Task checkbox-95: Add a fixture-only permit-process skeleton for a sign permit workflow using existing public fixture/source-inventory evidence only, with stages, required facts, required documents, file rules, fee/payment gates, inspection/finalization gates, and citation-backed action gates.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
